heading: About Me
p1: I'm an Information Systems student at FATEC Ourinhos, expecting to graduate in December 2026. Passionate about web development and building solutions that actually solve problems.
p2: Currently working as a Full Stack Developer Intern at Grupo CPCON Brasil, applying my skills in Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Python/Django on a daily basis. Previously worked as a Programmer at Interasoft.
p3: I believe good code is readable, testable, and maintainable and I always strive to balance fast delivery with long-term quality.
